title: Global Cash Is Fueling a Historic Start for Latin America Stocks
description: Global investors are piling into Latin American stocks at the fastest clip in a decade, sending markets across the region to multi-year highs.
content: Global investors are piling into Latin American stocks at the fastest clip in a decade, sending markets across the region to multi-year highs.
